feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Value help view without text-view in SCFD_EUI
entry.content:
Hi SAP-Experts,

I want to enable a custom ZZ-field of the include CI_CSKS for the FIORI-APP. The ZZ-field has a check table. In SCFD_EUI. The semantic type is LIST (for Code List). SCFD_EUI generates two cds-templates for the value help view. One for the code view and one for the text view. I would use the check table for code view. But I don't have a text table for the text view.

Can I create a value help view with a code view, but without a text view ? If yes, how can I do it? Or do I always have to implement a code view and a text view? In this case, I have to create a text table for the check table, right ?

Thanks for any help.

entry.title: How to add custom fields in Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Fiori app in SAP GTS
entry.content:
Hi ,

In SAP GTS , there are no CFL to add custom fields to standard apps . Can you please guide step by step how to add custom fields like producer code and net cost to Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Standard Fiori APP .

Also if standard fiori app needs to be copied to custom fiori app , what are the ABAP required changes to be done for custom fiori app.

Detailed Explanation with Example would be appreciated .

Regards,

SN

SAP Global Trade Services  @SAP  SAP Fiori OData

entry.title: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am searching MM03 in fiori, it shows all items related to MM03.

Herewith I attach the screeshot for your reference.

entry.title: fiori app
entry.content: hi Masters I have a CDS view in S4 system I want to create one fiori app for that CDS view and I want to launch it with fiori app pad how to do please help I am very new in SAP

entry.title: Getting error while adding New system in VS CODE using SAP Fiori generator.
entry.content:
In SAP Fiori Generator, Data Source and Service Selection->Connect to system->ABAP on Premise->enter system URL->user->login. I am getting dump in the wizard.Pls suggest.

Observations

1. In my system its shows -1, but in others system it shows blank. 

2. The generator is working fine if I directly connect to the odata services, but gives error during system connect.

 

 

 

 

{"message":"@sap/fiori:app generator failed - {\"message\":\"Could not update method 'validate' in 'abapOnPrem:serviceSelection' question in generator '@sap/fiori:app' - evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\",\"stack\":\"TypeError: evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\\n at Fiori.validate (C:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\npm\\\\node_modules\\\\@sap\\\\generator-fiori\\\\generators\\\\open-ux-shared\\\\index.js:1:1283672)\\n at w.<anonymous> (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2746217)\\n at Generator.next (<anonymous>)\\n at c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740597\\n at new Promise (<anonymous>)\\n at r (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740342)\\n at w.evaluateMethod (c:\\\\Users\\\\username...

entry.title: Executing BW Queries in background mode
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

We are using SAP S/4 HANA On premise with Fiori. 

I am looking for ways to improve query performance. Some queries which are created with the fiori app: "custom analytical queries" are taking too long to load, resulting in browser errors. Therefore, I am also looking for ways to execute these BW queries in the background. Either via SAP GUI or SAP Fiori. Can anyone help me? 

Via other community posts I see the transaction RSBATCH coming up several times but the transaction is not very user friendly. Is this the right way forward?  


Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to send multiple default values for a smart filter property from SAP ABAP OData?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send multiple default values for a smart filter property maintained in UI from SAP ABAP OData service DEFINE method. By using set_default_value I could send only one default value.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Forgot Password link in Fiori Launchpad login screen
entry.content:
do any of you have documentation on how to successfully implement the password reset function as suggested in SAP note “2565111 - Forgot password functionality in SAP Fiori Launchpad logon page is not available”.

 

BR

Marco

entry.title: SAP CAP + Fiori Elements + fiori-tools-servestatic
entry.content:
Hello all,
 
we are facing some issues since a few days with loading a custom lib. It seems that a 
 
cds watch 
 
isn't serving paths of a Fiori elements app correctly which are configured over the middleware task fiori-tools-servestatic. The log says that it is served but over the browser we are not able to access it.
Over a ui serve of the app it's working.
 
server:
  customMiddleware:   
    - name: fiori-tools-servestatic
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        paths:
          - path: /testIT
            src: "/home/user/projects/myproject/test"
 
As a result custom libs can not be loaded in BAS / Build Code when running cds watch.
 
CAP version is 9, but it is not working with the latest 8 version neither. 
"cds-plugin-ui5": "^0.13.0" ist in use as well.
 
Anybody an idea what has changed?

entry.title: Fiori App My Team Calendar (F1309B) metadata issue
entry.content:
Hello Expert, i'm facing an issue with le application F1309B (2023 FPS02 o,n premise).

After completing all the steps to add in the fiorilaunchpad ( SICF node activation), publish the OData V4 Service Group UI_HCMMYTEAMCALENDAR_V4, create the semantic object, the target mapping etc...), i'm facing these issue on the load of the application.

Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Failed to get contexts for /sap/opu/odata4/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar_v4/srvd/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar/0001/TeamCalendarShareMode with start index 0 and length Infinity - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Could you help me in finding what i'm missing here?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: SSO not working. OAuth2UserTokenExchange. Unable to login to travel list app
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Recently I deployed an app to HTML5 Repository in SAP BTP

html5 app repository:

when i click on "sapfedemotravellist"  , i am presented with an alert in the new tab:

even after putting correct id and password this just keeps on coming. I tried with client id and client secret also and still the same alert keep popping.

Please help me resolve this issue.

Destination:

Destination Trust:

Trial Users:

Subaccount Trial: Trust Configuration:

Subscriptions & Instances:

App's xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "sapfedemotravellist",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "description": "Security profile of called application",
  "scopes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
 
xs-app.json
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-########trial-dev",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

Please help in this regard.

@SAPSupport 

@jlong 

@K120525 

@dennis_koehler 

@DonWilliams 

@paula_augedahl 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@William_Wu 

@Ulrich_Schmidt 

@sapcommunity

entry.title: How to check if standard Fiori App is using SOAP API
entry.content: Our client is transitioning to a new integration platform that no longer supports legacy IDOCs and SOAP APIs. We have deployed several standard Fiori applications for them. Most of the Fiori apps for sure uses oData servicse (REST API) but i guess there's a few that does not use REST. We would like to find out if there is a way to identify whether any of these Fiori apps rely on SOAP APIs. This will help us determine which APIs need to be migrated to REST.

entry.title: Rework required for Fiori apps exposed in SAP Workzone containing calls to external data sources?
entry.content:
Dear community,
I have this problem with a Fiori app exposed in SAP Workzone. The app contains a call to an archive server to fetch image data (of a scanned invoice). The app works fine when the user is logged in to the company intranet, but is not able to retrieve the image when logged on only to SAP Workzone, because the user's browser cannot reach the archive server (which is not exposed to Internet).

It seems to me that the only way to make the app work in SAP Workzone is to replace the client-side call to the external data source with a server-side call. That way the SAP Back-end would execute the call, fetch the data and push it to the SAP Workzone user.

In general this code rework should be done for all Fiori apps that use external (not part of the back-end) data sources. 
Or am I wrong here?

entry.title: Putting user defaults in a key user adaption view
entry.content:
When a user uses a key user adaptation of a Listreport with a smartFilterBar, the user's default values are not being populated in the (blank) filter fields. I understand this is standard behavior, but our users do not like it one bit.

Example: app F2173 (Find Maintenance Orders and Operations). Our key user has made a key user adaptation, setting certain filter fields, but leaving the planning plant blank. The intention was that actual users would use that adaptation, and see the planning plant filled with their individual default.

I have tried creating a controller extension in BAS, and I was able to read the user's defaults, but I can't set the values in the smartFilterBar. The console message I get is that the smartFilterBar is not yet initialized. Adding a call to the init() function does not help, as that generates all kinds of errors about duplicate objects.

Has anyone found a way to accomplish this?

We are on Fiori 1.108.38.

entry.title: How to restrict access to certain fields of upload in Mass upload apps in Fiori
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are moving towards the clean core post s/4 HANA migration and trying to make the processes standard as possible and avoid custom code changes.

There are multiple custom programs which allow users to mass update certain fields in material master according to their roles and departments. So, we have Fiori apps that cater to mass updates but giving them access to these Fiori apps will allow them to update all the fields. So how do we restrict to allow them to upload only  certain fields or do we continue to edit and cater these needs through our custom programs?

Please suggest for a best approach so we can avoid the custom code changes.

 

Thanks

Gowthami

entry.title: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount
entry.content:
cf html5-list showing 

But still unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount.
Should I wait as it is in Trial Account ?

Hence Content Manager also not showing anything 


Please find the detail.

This is regarding my trial account 7bc94454trial.
 
Here the below UI5 app
"hanaodataservices.ui5fristapponhanaodata"
is not showing in the HTML5 Application under BTP Subaccount after successful deployment to cloud foundry, cf html5-list also showing the same & I have all the role collection access, Servcices deployed and entitlement and subscription intact.
 
Please find all the required screenshots.
 
region -us10

 

 
 

 

 
 

 


Need help on the same.

entry.title: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we habe a problem with opening the Custom Fields and Logic App on SAP Fiori Launchpad. Everytime you open the app we got the error message that the system is on write protect mode. We looked in the transaction SCC4 and SE06 to look up if the system is proteceted against changes. But the system (specially) the client is not protected against changes therefore we searched the internet for similar errors and we added the fiori katalog into the roles of the user, but also without any success. 

Could anyone of you help us in this matter, we would be very appreciated. 

Best regards,

Adam

entry.title: After S4 upgrade ,style.css files are not loading for SAP ui5 apps in flp
entry.content:
Hi,

We have recently upgraded from S4 2018 to 2023, After S4 upgrade ,style.css files are not loading for SAP ui5 apps in flp, 

it is working fine in 2018, not in 2023
I have made the below changes in Manifest.json and component .js, but no luck

Kindly help,

 

Best Regards,
Supreeth

entry.title: sap ovp table with dynamic collumns
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirements is to show a collumn with the customer and the others will be the month/year dynamically. Like below:

CUSTOMER | MONTH1/YEAR1 | MONTH2/YEAR1 | .. | MONTH12/YEAR1 | MONTH1/YEAR2 | MONTH2/YEAR2 etc

Is it possble to add dynamic collumns for a sap.ovp.cards.table ? It's mandatory to be in a overview page because I have many others cards working there.

Or, if there are any other suggestions, I'm accepting too.

BR

entry.title: FIORI application issue
entry.content: I have added new role to my FIORI application for Manage Posting period but it was not fetching the data in fiori application whenever i am checking  there in FIORI application it says no matching found ?
